title: kielboul
side_effects: Kielboul can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and stomach pain due to its high content of essential oils. Consuming large quantities can cause allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing in some individuals. Additionally, using kielboul without proper preparation and cooking methods can lead to digestive issues, such as diarrhea and vomiting. In severe cases, improper use of kielboul has been linked to kidney damage and liver problems in some individuals.
